creator: allanjude@FreeBSD.org
text:
As far as I am aware (I am not a lawyer), it would actually be a bigger concern if they were advertising it as FreeBSD, they must follow the terms of use for the trademark:

https://www.freebsdfoundation.org/legal/trademark-usage-terms-and-conditions/

and the Logo:

https://www.freebsdfoundation.org/about/project/
